item.title: U-Shaped Kitchen Design with Island
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Chris Selvais)
item.description: U Shaped Kitchen Design with Island Kitchen Shape: Double Galley Flooring: Tile, Marble, or Stone Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 298 sq. ft. Voltage: 240 V Installation Options: Tempzone Flex Rolls: “Hard flooring surfaces can be cold underfoot any time of year, but are especially so when the weather gets cooler. Who wouldn’t enjoy the comfort of a WarmlyYours radiant in-floor heating system in their home?

item.title: Double Galley Kitchen with Island
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Chris Selvais)
item.description: Double Galley Kitchen with Island Kitchen Shape: Double Galley Flooring: Tile, Marble, or Stone Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 340 sq. ft. Voltage: 240 V Installation Options: Tempzone Floor Heating Cable: “The WarmlyYours TempZone™ 3.7-Watt Floor Heating Cable allows you to bring radiant warmth to any room. TempZone™ Floor Heating Cable (Twin) is ultra-low EMF by design. It features a twin conductor with a 15’ cold lead and is available in two voltage options and a range of lengths to meet the requirements of any installation.

item.description: L Shaped Open Kitchen Floor Plan Kitchen Shape: L Shaped Flooring: Exposed Concrete Floor (New Pour) Subfloor: Newly Poured Indoor Concrete Slab Insulation Surface: 169 sq. ft. Voltage: 240 V Installation Options: Slab Heat Cables: “Are you considering installing heated concrete floors in your home? Even if you aren’t building a new home, perhaps you’re thinking about adding a sunroom or garage to your house.

item.title: Spacious L Shaped Kitchen with Island
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Chris Selvais)
item.description: Spacious L Shaped Kitchen with Island Kitchen Shape: L Shaped Flooring: Tile, Marble, or Stone Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 215 sq. ft. Voltage: 240 V Installation Options: Tempzone Flex Roll: “Add radiant warmth to your tile and stone floors with WarmlyYours TempZone™ Flex Rolls. These 240 VAC floor heating rolls feature a 1/8” TempZone™ heating cable, affixed to a mesh fabric backing in a serpentine pattern to evenly distribute heat across the floor.
